_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: User-centred analysis involves giving direction on which tools or methods to use; bringing insight and expertise to how user needs have changed over time and ensure that they're met; apply strategic thinking to the problem of how to provide the best service for the end user; consider the political strategy and implications of any analyses and insights.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned, and accessible to a non-technical business audience.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-010 (AB, cosine: 0.390), AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.377).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.350). Shared vocabulary: [analysis]. DDaT-only terms [analyses, apply, best, bringing, centred, changed] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessible, audience, business, clearly, documentation, non] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.847 (P=0.833, R=0.861). R exceeds P by 0.028 — the WIDAI KSA's 17 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 57 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "User-centred analysis involves giving direction on which tools or methods to use" and "Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.457 > STS 0.350 (gap +0.107). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [analysis] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.7%. Shared tokens: [analysis]. DDaT-only: [analyses, apply, best, bringing, centred, changed]. WIDAI-only: [accessible, audience, business, clearly, documentation, non].
